shared_case_surface: aoa-memo write-path cases that keep local candidate, receipt, export, reviewed intake, landing receipt, durable object, and generated read model posture separately reviewable
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace the concrete cases only if it preserves the same write-path guardrail question, keeps source trust, ingestion risk, derivation lineage, action-safety separation, durable landing gate, and authority split explicit, and does not turn this bundle into recall precision, contradiction handling, KAG lift, role authorization, or broad memory-safety grading.
public_safe_requirements: a bounded outside reviewer can inspect candidate, receipt, export, reviewed intake, landing receipt, object, and generated read model refs directly
untrusted, unknown, candidate-only, missing-evidence, or missing-receipt inputs remain blocked from durable landing
risk marking and derivation lineage remain visible before summarization or promotion
action-bearing source text remains data unless an owning runtime or operator route separately authorizes action
MCP and local memo ports stay access or forwarding planes rather than durable memory authority
